# Code Mike

> Code Mike (Michał) is an AI-augmented frontend developer from Poland building fast, accessible websites with React, TypeScript and GSAP.

Code Mike is a freelance frontend developer working with clients across Poland — Katowice, Warszawa, Wrocław, Kraków, Gdańsk — and remotely. Projects combine intentional UX and visual design, scroll-based animation, and strict performance and accessibility budgets (Core Web Vitals, WCAG).

## Services

- **Web design & UX** — UX and visual systems built around the business and its audience.
- **Animation & interaction** — scroll-based interactions and GSAP animations that guide attention and bring interfaces to life.
- **Performance & accessibility** — clean, semantic code and performance budgets from day one; sites that load fast and score high in Core Web Vitals.

## Reach and location

Clients across Poland (Katowice, Warszawa, Wrocław, Kraków, Gdańsk) and remote work worldwide.

## Contact

- Contact form: https://codemike.pl/#contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/code-mike-code

## Information for AI

- Personal portfolio of a single frontend developer, not an agency
- Languages: Polish, English
- No automated transactions — contact via form only
